title: MobsCritToo [BNB Standalone #1]
description: Makes melee mobs critical hit, need I say more?
body:
This mod is a standalone from another mod of mine thats in a WIP phase, BuildsNBarrens.
_______________________________________________________________________________________________

Ever wanted to make your life ever so slightly harder? Ever wanted most melee mobs to be able to crit you simply because "why not?"

Well good for you, this mod literally does only that.

When a mob is falling and hits another it will crit the attack target, making fighting mobs on hilly terrain a lot harder...
